raw:
# slug: Unique identifier for the mission (example: "spyder_maniac_achievement1")
#        Must have a translation entry in base.po with msgid = slug.
# description: Detailed description of the mission objectives (example: "spyder_maniac_achievement2")
#        Must have a translation entry in base.po with msgid = description.
# prerequisites: List of game variables required to unlock the mission
#        Example: [{ maniac_achievements: "yes" }]
# failure_conditions: List of game variables that, if met, cause the mission to fail
# connected_missions: List of missions that this one unlocks (example: [])
# required_items: Dictionary of items required to begin the mission
#        Keys: item slugs (must exist in item database)
#        Values: optional quantity (None means at least one)
# required_monsters: Dictionary of monsters required to begin the mission
#        Keys: monster slugs (must exist in monster database)
#        Values: optional minimum level (None means any level)
# required_missions: List of mission slugs that must be completed before this one
# steps: Dictionary of mission steps defining structure and branching logic
#   slug: Unique identifier for the step (example: "start_validation")
#   order: Integer progression order index (example: 0, 1, 2…)
#   description: Text describing what the step requires (must have translation in base.po)
#   conditions: Dictionary of game variables that must all be true
#   any_of: Alternative condition sets; step completes if any are satisfied
#   all_of: Additional condition sets; all must be satisfied
#   next_steps: List of slugs of next steps unlocked when this one is completed
#   step_items_needed: Items required to complete this step (same rules as required_items)
#   step_monsters_needed: Monsters required to complete this step (same rules as required_monsters)
#   optional: Boolean flag indicating whether the step is optional
# repeatable: Boolean flag indicating whether the mission can be repeated (default: false)

- slug: spyder_maniac_achievement1
  description: spyder_maniac_achievement2
  prerequisites:
    - key: maniac_achievements
      value: "yes"
  failure_conditions: []
  connected_missions: []
  required_items: {}
  required_monsters: {}
  required_missions: []
  repeatable: false
  steps:
    start_validation:
      slug: start_validation
      order: 0
      description: Verify maniac achievements unlocked.
      conditions:
        key: maniac_achievements
        value: "yes"
      next_steps:
        - fossil_check
        - shammer_check
      optional: false
    fossil_check:
      slug: fossil_check
      order: 1
      description: Confirm player has both fossils.
      conditions:
        key: got_both_fossils
        value: "yes"
      next_steps:
        - candy_trade
      optional: false
    shammer_check:
      slug: shammer_check
      order: 1
      description: Verify possession of Shammer monster.
      conditions:
        key: got_shammer
        value: "yes"
      next_steps:
        - candy_trade
      optional: false
    candy_trade:
      slug: candy_trade
      order: 2
      description: Confirm candy trade with catgirl was completed.
      conditions:
        key: catgirl_candy_hastraded
        value: "yes"
      any_of:
        - key: got_both_fossils
          value: "yes"
        - key: got_shammer
          value: "yes"
      next_steps: []
      optional: false
